accedeix_al_teu_panell_de_monitoritzacio: Access your forest IoT node monitoring dashboard
programa_el_firmware_al_rak4631: Program the firmware on the RAK4631
registra_el_node_i_genera_la_appkey: Register the node and generate the AppKey
vincula_el_node_al_teu_compte: Link the node to your account
cap_node_registrat_afegeix_el_teu_primer: No registered nodes — add your first node
aquest_assistent_et_guiara_pas_a_pas_pri: This wizard will guide you step by step. First indicate how you have connected your gateway.
introdueix_el_device_eui_del_teu_node_pe: Enter your node's Device EUI to link it to your Espvrna account and monitor its data on the map in real time.
el_node_apareixera_al_mapa_en_breus_mome: The node will appear on the map in a few moments, once it sends the first data.
sistema_firesense_operatiu_servidors_eu8: Espvrna system operational · EU-868 servers online
firesense_monitora_el_parc_de_collserola: Espvrna monitors the Collserola Park with LoRa IoT sensors to detect forest fire risks ultra-early.
protegir_el_pulmo_verd_de_barcelona_dete: Protect Barcelona's green lung by detecting any risk of fire hours before it spreads.
nascut_a_linstitut_tecnologic_de_barcelo: Born at the Barcelona Institute of Technology, Espvrna is an academic project that applies real IoT technology to solve a critical problem.
desc_historia: Born at the Institut Tecnològic de Barcelona, Espvrna is an academic project applying real IoT technology to solve a critical problem: the ultra-early detection of forest fires in Collserola Park.
desc_missio: Protecting Barcelona's green lung by detecting any fire risk hours before it spreads. Forest fires destroy millions of hectares every year — Espvrna aims to change that.
desc_tecnologia: RAK4631 LoRaWAN sensors with 15km coverage transmit soil temperature and humidity data every hour to the central dashboard, with real-time alerts and NASA FIRMS visualization.
desc_rak4631: Nordic nRF52840 + SX1262 LoRa. Temperature, humidity and battery sensors. OTAA activation with AES-128.
desc_gateway: 8 EU868 channels. 4G/Ethernet backhaul. Deployed on the ITB rooftop with Collserola visibility.
desc_chirpstack: Open-source LoRaWAN Network Server. OTAA management, payload decoding and HTTP → Node-RED integration.
desc_nodered: Visual data pipelines. Transformation, filtering and time-series storage with Flux queries.
desc_dashboard: 2D/3D map. NASA FIRMS, NDVI, EONET. Live wind, LOS, antenna coverage and Chart.js graphs.
desc_meshcore: Complementary mesh network with 2 gateways, 2 repeaters and 2 sensors for areas without direct coverage.
footer_meta: Institut Tecnològic de Barcelona — ASIX2c ✦ AI-Generated Visuals
